hero.subtitle: Barcelona's Finest
hero.title: Obba Korean BBQ
hero.description: An authentic Korean barbecue experience — grill your own premium cuts at your table.

reviews.name: Yan
reviews.text: Now this is authentic Korean food. Ordered pork and chadol set and japchae and we loved everything. We're excited to come back and try the rest of the menu. Service is 💯 too!

reviews.name: Clément B.
reviews.text: OBBA Corea BBQ is the real deal, just like in Seoul. Fresh food, excellent quality, and the staff even cook for you like in the high-end BBQ spots in Korea. Service is great, and best of all, you don’t leave smelling like smoke thanks to their top-notch ventilation system.

reviews.name: Emily M.
reviews.text: I can't say enough good things about this restaurant. The Korean BBQ is on point and delicious and the staff is super friendly. My favorites here are the Galbi, spicy bulgogi, tteok-bokki and japchae. Definitely a great restaurant, reservations recommended.

reviews.name: Jin M.
reviews.text: I've repeated and brought many of my friends over to this restaurant, its amazingly good! The food is very authentic, the banchan are seasonal in true korean fashion and the cuts of meat for the bbq are always on point.

reviews.name: Roberto P.
reviews.text: This hidden gem offers delicious Korean food. I found it perfect to go to eat with your couple or in small or large groups of friends. I loved the interior decoration, which is dimly lit and quite comfortable, cozy and elegant.

reviews.name: Emily C.
reviews.text: Authentic Korean barbeque run by a Korean owner. They serve excellent quality of meat and vegetables, juicy and fresh. The 2-people beef set  is extremely good for value! Must visit to satisfy an Asian appetite.

experience.title: The Obba Experience
experience.subtitle: Korean BBQ is more than a meal — it's an interactive dining ritual.

steps.title: Step 1
steps.heading: Select
steps.description: Choose from our premium cuts of marinated beef, pork, and chef combos.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.heading: Grill
steps.description: Cook it yourself on our traditional tabletop charcoal grills to your perfect doneness.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.heading: Enjoy
steps.description: Wrap in fresh lettuce with ssamjang, garlic, and our signature sides.
